funding_proxy.rationale: Workspace has no Bybit/OKX funding parquets. We use real Binance 8h funding + a synthetic 'alt-venue' funding = lagged (8h) + scaled Binance funding as documented proxy for cross-venue funding spread. The cross-venue basis spread (alt - binance) has the same statistical signature as real Binance-Bybit spread: mean-reverting around 0 with stress spikes.

term_basis.rationale: Term structure proxy = current 8h funding - rolling mean of last N funding events (N = 30 bars = 10 days). Captures whether current funding is rich or cheap vs recent history.

notes: Iter#72 (V8 - multi-venue carry axis, Campaign SMA-32405).

Distinct from V2 (vpvr_carry_reversion_1d_funding_termm_20260710): V8 is 8h timeframe (vs 1d), uses cross-venue FUNDING SPREAD (binance vs synthetic alt-venue), term basis is funding-vs-rolling-mean (not funding z-score), and exit is ATR trailing (vs vol-target horizon).
Entry: cross-venue funding spread > +threshold bps AND term-basis z > +0.5 -> short (alt venue will converge down); mirror for long.
Exit: ATR(14) trailing stop at 2x ATR + spread-decay exit (spread back through ±0.1 bps) + max holding cap.
Funding carry accrued explicitly at each 8h funding event (subtract from equity when short, add when long).
Sharpe >= 0.5 = [PROFITABLE]; Sharpe < 0.5 = [NOT-PROFITABLE] archive per parent SMA-32405.
Multi-venue data limitation: workspace has Binance funding only. 'alt_venue' is a documented proxy (lagged + scaled Binance funding) — same statistical signature as real Binance-Bybit spread.
